problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Ketamine-like. Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
